profile.name: Jeevithan R R
profile.title: Full Stack Developer
profile.subtitle: & Data Analyst
profile.tagline: Architecting AI-powered systems at the intersection of elegant engineering and actionable intelligence.
profile.bio: B.Tech Computer Science (AI) engineer who ships production-grade MERN applications and predictive analytics models. From enterprise payroll SaaS to clinical risk engines — I build software that is scalable, intelligent, and beautifully crafted.

projects.title: Payro
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Payroll & Workforce Intelligence
projects.description: Scalable enterprise payroll SaaS with RBAC-driven workforce management across 7+ institutional roles. AI-powered analytics with performance scoring, reliability indexing, and glassmorphism dashboards.

projects.title: TalentMatch
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Job Matching Platform
projects.description: MERN Stack recruitment platform with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini resume parsing, JWT/RBAC auth, Swagger UI docs, secured APIs, and recruiter dashboard with real-time job aggregation.

projects.title: Clinical Risk Analytics
projects.subtitle: Healthcare Cost Intelligence Platform
projects.description: Predicted 30-day readmission risk across 6 conditions for 1,200+ patients. Surfaced $2.4M+ projected savings and cut manual chart review time by 40%.

projects.title: Retail Intelligence NLP
projects.subtitle: Inventory & Financial Sentiment Pipeline
projects.description: Dead-stock risk model identifying $27,790+ in locked capital. LR, Naive Bayes, and SVM ensemble trained on 5,000+ financial headlines — 88%+ NLP accuracy.

projects.title: SaaS Analytics Platform
projects.subtitle: Business Intelligence Dashboard
projects.description: Full-stack analytics SaaS with real-time KPI tracking, cohort analysis, funnel visualization, and executive reporting — built on a React + Node.js microservice stack.
